CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Devin P. Whiteford, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, GOGRID, LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant INADCO, INC.,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Simon Tam sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $95,617.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $15,088.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $520.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $111,225.00

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Continued To Oct-05-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
